title: Beam Global Solar EV Charging Access and Equity
text: Beam Global's solar-powered EV charging infrastructure can expand electric vehicle charging access and improve equity in underserved communities. Traditional grid-connected charging requires significant electrical infrastructure investment making deployment in certain areas economically challenging. Beam Global's off-grid EV ARC system combines solar generation, battery storage, and EV charging in a transportable unit requiring no grid connection or utility work. This approach enables rapid deployment in parking lots, municipal facilities, and community spaces where infrastructure deployment has been infeasible. Off-grid solar charging reduces long-term operating costs compared to grid-connected solutions. Environmental benefits include 100% renewable energy generation with EV charging capability and resilience during grid outages. Beam Global's technology addresses critical EV charging infrastructure gap while promoting equitable access to sustainable transportation in underserved communities.
